utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God Stu ! I ... I can not believe you did this ! Now are you absolutely sure she is a hooker ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_I ... I can not believe you did this ! Now are you absolutely sure she is a hooker ?

utterances.speaker: Stu
utterances.text: Either that or she is just the best , most expensive date I ever had .
